accessibility_findings.remediation: Add an alt attribute describing the image content, or alt="" if purely decorative.

accessibility_findings.message: Embedded video from https://www.youtube.com/embed/vo4pMVb0R6M has unconfirmed captions (captions_declared=False).
accessibility_findings.remediation: Verify that the video has accurate captions enabled. For YouTube, open the video and confirm closed captions are available and are not auto-generated without review.

accessibility_findings.message: Link opens in a new tab/window without warning: "Reading Reflection form".
accessibility_findings.remediation: Add an aria-label that includes "(opens in new tab)" or add a visually-hidden span with that text so screen reader users are informed.

accessibility_findings.message: PDF file "syllabus.pdf" requires manual accessibility verification.
accessibility_findings.remediation: Run the file through Adobe Acrobat's Accessibility Checker or PAC 2024. Ensure the PDF is tagged, has a logical reading order, alt text on images, and an accessible form structure if applicable.

accessibility_findings.message: Word document "cornell-note-template.docx" requires manual accessibility verification.
accessibility_findings.remediation: Use Word's built-in Accessibility Checker (Review → Check Accessibility). Ensure headings, alt text, table headers, and reading order are correct before uploading.
